title: Propose a JSON patch for the live aimbot config
prompt:
You are reviewing an aimbot tuning snapshot. Current config + recent stats:

current:
  intervalMs: 60
  palette: all
  minConfidence: 0.015
  burstSize: 5
  shotDelay: 85
  maxShots: 7

last 90 seconds:
  scans: 72
  hits: 31
  shots: 148
  engages: 18
  errors: 0
  avgConfidence: 0.047

Propose a JSON patch object. Include only fields you want to CHANGE. Valid keys + ranges:
  intervalMs     40 - 400
  minConfidence  0.010 - 0.200
  burstSize      1 - 6
  shotDelay      60 - 300
  maxShots       1 - 8
  palette        "red" | "purple" | "all"

Respond with EXACTLY one valid JSON object — no prose, no markdown, no code fences. If no changes are warranted, respond with {}.

Your JSON:
